templates.name: Equities Static Universe
templates.description: Simple template with a fixed list of assets, indicators, and a scheduled event.

templates.name: Equities Universe
templates.description: Fundamental universe selecting top undervalued large-caps ranked by an EMA100/EMA300 cross, rebalanced daily.

templates.name: Chained Universe
templates.description: Chains an ETF-constituents universe (QQQ) into a fundamental PE filter to select the most undervalued stocks.

templates.name: History and ETF Universe
templates.description: Selects QQQ constituents, ranks them by a daily ATR, and rebalances using ETF weights.

templates.name: Intraday Indicator Scans
templates.description: Scans QQQ constituents every 15 minutes with a minute-resolution ATR to select the most volatile constituents intraday.

templates.name: Custom Indicator
templates.description: Implements a custom Money Flow Index indicator and trades SPY on its signals.

templates.name: Custom Consolidators
templates.description: Builds a calendar-based QuoteBar consolidator anchored to 5 PM ET, applies an EMA on the consolidated Forex bars, and trades crossovers.

templates.name: Custom Data
templates.description: Defines a custom data source type that ingests Bitstamp data and plots daily Bitcoin prices.

templates.name: Custom Data with Ticker Mapping
templates.description: Loads custom data tied to an Equity whose ticker changed (FB to META) using point-in-time SecurityIdentifier mapping from the Object Store.

templates.name: Custom Models
templates.description: Replaces the default fee, fill, slippage, and buying-power models through a security initializer.

templates.name: Forex
templates.description: Trades three Forex pairs using a Minimum indicator on the bid-ask spread to enter when spreads are tightest.

templates.name: CFD
templates.description: Trades CFDs across German, Asian, and US index markets with Scheduled Events aligned to each market's hours.

templates.name: Crypto Static Universe
templates.description: Trades a fixed list of Cryptocurrencies on Bitfinex at minute resolution with a weekly rebalance.

templates.name: Crypto Universe
templates.description: Selects the top 10 Cryptos by USD volume on Coinbase and rebalances daily at noon.

templates.name: Crypto Futures
templates.description: Trades Crypto Futures (BTC, ETH, LTC) on Binance margin in USDT with weekly rebalancing and margin-interest tracking.

templates.name: Futures
templates.description: Trades the continuous E-mini SP 500 Future and rolls between contract months on SymbolChangedEvents.

templates.name: Equity Options Static
templates.description: Trades a fixed SPY Equity Option chain, constructing and rebalancing a covered call on a weekly schedule.

templates.name: Equity Options Universe
templates.description: Filters SPY weekly Equity Options to ATM calls and puts and executes a long straddle.

templates.name: Index Options Static
templates.description: Trades SPX Index Options, buying the ATM contract with the closest expiration.

templates.name: Index Options Universe
templates.description: Filters the SPXW Index Option chain to 0DTE strikes near ATM and buys the call with the lower strike.

templates.name: Intraday Index Options Selection
templates.description: Loads the SPX weekly chain daily and re-filters ATM calls every 5 minutes to trade as contracts update intraday.

templates.name: Intraday Greeks-Based Options Selection
templates.description: Selects RUT Index Options intraday by target delta from EMA-driven signals with paced order submission.

templates.name: Future Options
templates.description: Builds a bull call spread on E-mini SP500 Future Options.

templates.name: Alternative Data
templates.description: Ranks Equities with the Brain ML Ranking dataset and sizes positions from predicted returns via portfolio targets.

templates.name: Alternative Data Universe
templates.description: Uses EODHD upcoming-earnings data to select Equities and trades straddles around earnings announcements.

templates.name: Alternative Data Universe for CNBC Trading
templates.description: Selects US Equities with 3+ BUY recommendations from CNBC personalities and equal-weights them with a daily scheduled rebalance.

templates.name: Alternative Data Universe for Brain Language Metrics on Company Filings
templates.description: Selects US Equities with positive sentiment in both the report and MD&A sections of their latest SEC filings and equal-weights them with a daily scheduled rebalance.

templates.name: Alternative Data Universe for Brain ML Stock Ranking
templates.description: Selects US Equities with positive Brain ML rankings across 2-, 3-, and 5-day horizons and equal-weights them with a daily scheduled rebalance.

templates.name: Alternative Data Universe for Brain Sentiment Indicator
templates.description: Selects US Equities with positive 7-day media sentiment and active mention coverage and equal-weights them with a daily scheduled rebalance.

templates.name: Alternative Data Universe for CoinGecko Crypto Market Cap
templates.description: Selects the top 10 Cryptocurrencies by CoinGecko market cap that are tradable on Coinbase and equal-weights them with a daily scheduled rebalance.

templates.name: Alternative Data Universe for EODHD Upcoming Dividends
templates.description: Selects US Equities going ex-dividend in the next day with a payout above $0.05 and equal-weights them with a daily scheduled rebalance.

templates.name: Alternative Data Universe for EODHD Upcoming Earnings
templates.description: Selects US Equities reporting earnings in the next 3 days with a positive analyst estimate and equal-weights them with a daily scheduled rebalance.

templates.name: Alternative Data Universe for EODHD Upcoming IPOs
templates.description: Selects expected/priced non-penny IPOs with a confirmed IPO date and equal-weights them with a daily scheduled rebalance.

templates.name: Alternative Data Universe for EODHD Upcoming Splits
templates.description: Selects US Equities with a forward split in the next 3 days and equal-weights them with a daily scheduled rebalance.

templates.name: Alternative Data Universe for Corporate Lobbying
templates.description: Selects US Equities whose corporate lobbying spend totals at least $100K and equal-weights them with a daily scheduled rebalance.

templates.name: Alternative Data Universe for Insider Trading
templates.description: Selects the 10 US Equities with the largest insider-trading dollar volume and equal-weights them with a daily scheduled rebalance.

templates.name: Alternative Data Universe for US Congress Trading
templates.description: Selects US Equities recently bought by US Congress members in trades over $200K and equal-weights them with a daily scheduled rebalance.

templates.name: Alternative Data Universe for US Government Contracts
templates.description: Selects US Equities with at least 3 government contracts totalling over $50K and equal-weights them with a daily scheduled rebalance.

templates.name: Alternative Data Universe for Smart Insider Intentions
templates.description: Selects $100M+ market-cap US Equities announcing buyback intentions over 0.5% of shares and equal-weights them with a daily scheduled rebalance.

templates.name: Alternative Data Universe for Smart Insider Transactions
templates.description: Selects $100M+ market-cap US Equities executing buybacks over 0.5% of shares and equal-weights them with a daily scheduled rebalance.

templates.name: Alternative Data Chained Universe for CNBC Trading
templates.description: Selects US Equities with 3+ BUY recommendations from CNBC personalities from the top 100 US Equities by dollar volume and equal-weights them with a daily scheduled rebalance.

templates.name: Alternative Data Chained Universe for Brain Language Metrics on Company Filings
templates.description: Selects US Equities with positive sentiment in both the report and MD&A sections of their latest SEC filings from the top 100 US Equities by dollar volume and equal-weights them with a daily scheduled rebalance.

templates.name: Alternative Data Chained Universe for Brain ML Stock Ranking
templates.description: Selects US Equities with positive Brain ML rankings across 2-, 3-, and 5-day horizons from the top 100 US Equities by dollar volume and equal-weights them with a daily scheduled rebalance.

templates.name: Alternative Data Chained Universe for Brain Sentiment Indicator
templates.description: Selects US Equities with positive 7-day media sentiment and active mention coverage from the top 100 US Equities by dollar volume and equal-weights them with a daily scheduled rebalance.

templates.name: Alternative Data Chained Universe for EODHD Upcoming Dividends
templates.description: Selects US Equities going ex-dividend in the next day with a payout above $0.05 from the top 100 US Equities by dollar volume and equal-weights them with a daily scheduled rebalance.

templates.name: Alternative Data Chained Universe for EODHD Upcoming Earnings
templates.description: Selects US Equities reporting earnings in the next 3 days with a positive analyst estimate from the top 100 US Equities by dollar volume and equal-weights them with a daily scheduled rebalance.

templates.name: Alternative Data Chained Universe for EODHD Upcoming IPOs
templates.description: Selects expected/priced non-penny IPOs with a confirmed IPO date from the top 100 US Equities by dollar volume and equal-weights them with a daily scheduled rebalance.

templates.name: Alternative Data Chained Universe for EODHD Upcoming Splits
templates.description: Selects US Equities with a forward split in the next 3 days from the top 100 US Equities by dollar volume and equal-weights them with a daily scheduled rebalance.

templates.name: Alternative Data Chained Universe for Corporate Lobbying
templates.description: Selects US Equities whose corporate lobbying spend totals at least $100K from the top 100 US Equities by dollar volume and equal-weights them with a daily scheduled rebalance.

templates.name: Alternative Data Chained Universe for Insider Trading
templates.description: Selects the 10 US Equities with the largest insider-trading dollar volume from the top 100 US Equities by dollar volume and equal-weights them with a daily scheduled rebalance.

templates.name: Alternative Data Chained Universe for US Congress Trading
templates.description: Selects US Equities recently bought by US Congress members in trades over $200K from the top 100 US Equities by dollar volume and equal-weights them with a daily scheduled rebalance.

templates.name: Alternative Data Chained Universe for US Government Contracts
templates.description: Selects US Equities with at least 3 government contracts totalling over $50K from the top 100 US Equities by dollar volume and equal-weights them with a daily scheduled rebalance.

templates.name: Alternative Data Chained Universe for Smart Insider Intentions
templates.description: Selects $100M+ market-cap US Equities announcing buyback intentions over 0.5% of shares from the top 100 US Equities by dollar volume and equal-weights them with a daily scheduled rebalance.

templates.name: Alternative Data Chained Universe for Smart Insider Transactions
templates.description: Selects $100M+ market-cap US Equities executing buybacks over 0.5% of shares from the top 100 US Equities by dollar volume and equal-weights them with a daily scheduled rebalance.

templates.name: AI
templates.description: Trains a TensorFlow MLP weekly on warmed-up history to predict SPY direction.

templates.name: Trade Management
templates.description: Implements a One-Cancels-Other (OCO) pattern with a market order entry and paired stop-loss and take-profit orders, where one of the paired orders cancels when the other fills.

templates.name: Financial Advisors
templates.description: Demonstrates Interactive Brokers Financial Advisor group/account allocations via order properties along with live brokerage messages.

templates.name: Live Trading Features
templates.description: Demonstrates live email and SMS notifications, brokerage disconnect/reconnect handling, and commands.

templates.name: Equity Bollinger Mean Reversion
templates.description: Trades SPY on a 20-period, 2-standard-deviation Bollinger Bands mean-reversion signal — buys when price closes below the lower band and liquidates on a return to the middle band — with a daily scheduled rebalance.

templates.name: Option SPY Iron Condor
templates.description: Sells weekly SPY iron condors with short strikes ~10 delta and long wings 3 strikes wider.

templates.name: Equity RSI Overbought/Oversold
templates.description: Trades QQQ on a 14-period RSI: long when RSI < 30 and exit at RSI > 50; short when RSI > 70 and cover at RSI < 50.

templates.name: Equity MACD Histogram Divergence
templates.description: Detects MACD histogram divergence on AAPL and trades crossovers of the signal line, holding until the histogram flips sign.

templates.name: Equity Stochastic Oscillator
templates.description: Trades IWM with a 14/3/3 Stochastic oscillator, going long on %K crossing %D from below 20 and exiting on a cross from above 80.

templates.name: Equity Donchian Turtle Breakout
templates.description: Implements a 20/10 Donchian channel turtle breakout on a basket of liquid US ETFs with ATR-based position sizing.
